details.reasoning: Complete and correct implementation of Stepper compound component. All requirements met: (1) stepper.tsx has 'use client' and exports all 7 required sub-components (Stepper, StepperItem, StepperTrigger, StepperTitle, StepperDescription, StepperSeparator, StepperContent); (2) Each component uses proper data-slot attributes ('stepper', 'stepper-item', 'stepper-trigger', 'stepper-title', 'stepper-description', 'stepper-separator', 'stepper-content') and cn() for class merging; (3) React context properly implemented via StepperContext and StepperItemContext with corresponding hooks; (4) Both horizontal (default) and vertical orientations fully supported with responsive styling in StepperSeparator and StepperContent; (5) Two demo files provided (stepper-demo.tsx and stepper-vertical.tsx) both with 'use client', useState for step management, and complete usage patterns; (6) Registry entries correctly added for 'stepper' UI component and both 'stepper-demo' and 'stepper-vertical' examples with proper dependencies; (7) No existing files modified, only new files created and registry entries added.
